writing.task1:
Dear Residents,

Please be informed that water supply to floors 5–12 will be shut off on Tuesday, 20 August 2025, from 9 am to 5 pm for pipe replacement and maintenance to ensure a safer, more stable water system. We recommend storing enough water in advance, avoiding the use of washing machines or other water-dependent appliances, and keeping taps closed to prevent leaks when service resumes. For assistance, please contact Building Management at 012-345-6789. Thank you for your understanding and cooperation
writing.task2: I agree that AI writing tools should be allowed in language classes if students clearly disclose their use. My main reason is that these tools can act as learning aids rather than shortcuts. For example, a student writing an English essay might use an AI tool to suggest alternative vocabulary or improve sentence structure. By disclosing this use, the teacher can see how the original work was improved and give feedback on both the student’s writing and their use of the tool. This approach encourages students to learn from AI suggestions while maintaining academic honesty
writing.task3: The bar chart shows average hours spent and satisfaction ratings for four study resources among 200 learners in one month. Instructor-led courses had the highest time investment (8 hours) and a high satisfaction score (8.4/10). Speaking partners, despite the lowest time use (5 hours), achieved the highest satisfaction (8.7/10). Mobile apps and YouTube lessons had similar time commitments (6 and 7 hours) but slightly lower satisfaction (7.5 and 7.2).
